input.title: GoNote AI module finish-up checklist for this week
input.content:
There are 5 days left before release, so here is a review of the remaining work.

Backend:
- [ ] Update ent schema fields for ai_call_log, ai_usage_daily, and snippet_ai_metadata
- [ ] Add JSON repair and trace persistence to EnrichService
- [ ] Use a distributed lock to prevent concurrent workers from calling the LLM repeatedly
- [ ] Add 5 cases to the ai-eval golden set

Frontend:
- [ ] Show AI summaries and suggested tags on the note detail page
- [ ] Add an AI toggle in Settings

Ops:
- [ ] Add an AI dashboard in Grafana (tokens/cost/latency)
- [ ] Add alerts for Redis Stream consumer lag
